description: Context for GKG query-path events (gkg_query_executed, gkg_schema_introspected).

source_type.description: Source type of the request, matching the value emitted in the GKG JWT source_type claim by Rails.

tool_name.description: Name of the Orbit tool invoked (e.g. query_graph, get_graph_schema).

coding_agent.description: Identifier of the coding agent that initiated the request.

queried_namespace_ids.description: Namespace IDs associated with the query.

global_user_id.description: Globally unique identity of the calling user.

user_type.description: Distinguishes human users from automated callers.

plan.description: Name of the plan, such as free, premium or ultimate.

session_id.description: Correlates multiple Orbit tool calls within a single DAP session.

is_gitlab_team_member.description: Separates internal dogfooding from real external adoption.

query_type.description: DSL query type: traversal, aggregation, path_finding, neighbors.

node_count.description: Number of node clauses in the query.

relationship_count.description: Number of relationship clauses in the query.

entity_types.description: Distinct entity types referenced by node clauses.

filter_fields.description: Distinct field names used in filters.

filter_ops.description: Distinct filter operators used (eq, gt, contains, etc.).

is_search.description: True when the query is a single-node search (no relationships).

has_cursor.description: Whether the query uses cursor-based pagination.

has_order_by.description: Whether the query specifies an explicit ordering.

limit.description: Row limit requested by the query.

max_hops.description: Maximum hop count across all relationship clauses.

agg_functions.description: Distinct aggregation functions used (count, sum, avg, etc.).

group_by_count.description: Number of group-by keys in an aggregation query.

hydration_plan.description: Hydration strategy: none, static, or dynamic.

dynamic_columns.description: Dynamic column mode: all or default.

has_variable_hops.description: Whether any relationship uses variable-length hops.

has_virtual_columns.description: Whether any node references virtual columns.

duration_ms.description: Total wall-clock time for the pipeline execution.

compile_ms.description: Time spent compiling the query to SQL.

execute_ms.description: Time spent executing the query against ClickHouse.

row_count.description: Number of rows returned to the caller.

redacted_count.description: Number of rows removed by authorization.

ch_read_rows.description: Total rows read from ClickHouse across all queries.

ch_read_bytes.description: Total bytes read from ClickHouse across all queries.

ch_memory_usage.description: Peak memory usage reported by ClickHouse.
